title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | May 18, 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Hold temporarily; weak now but stable March results and dividend
recommendations.detail: Weak as of now but the March results were stable and there is a dividend. No need to sell in a hurry in this weakness. If you must sell, sell ex-dividend.
Weak as of now. Exit on rallies.

recommendations.note: Exit on a technical rally near 400 / 400-plus
recommendations.detail: Weak in the short-medium term; jewellery stocks got over-played and face government pressure, with lower sales likely pressuring profitability despite protected margins. On a technical rally closer to 400 or 400-plus, exit. The stock is testing a 52-week low; a couple of days' close below 350 could open a move below 300.

recommendations.note: Hold; decent March results, can recover to 480-500
recommendations.detail: Temporarily weak but decent enough March results. If the market gets some stability, KPI Green should improve again with clear signs of moving closer to 480-500. No need to panic.

recommendations.note: Exit/reduce on rallies; peak reached, flat result
recommendations.detail: The stock has reached a peak; it touched over 1,100 and is forming lower tops and lower bottoms, and the result was flat. It already ran from ~500 to 700-plus recently, so it is better to reduce the position. Exit on rallies.

recommendations.note: Exit at 180 on rallies for re-entry lower
recommendations.detail: A good Kerala-based company (with a Warangal plant) but textiles are weak since US tariffs began, and it is already a heavyweight/expensive, stable-results name. The stock has likely bottomed, but a rally from here depends on cotton prices. Exit on rallies at 180 for a re-entry at lower levels.

recommendations.note: Hold until results (~24th of the month)
recommendations.detail: Stabilizing/slightly declining only because of impending results (date thought to be around the 24th). The new subsidiary Capstone Home Services Pvt Ltd's impact will not be felt immediately. Hold until results; no need to be hasty.
There is hyper-speculative activity and huge continuous volumes in the stock, which has to be understood. Hold as of now; if bought at lower levels, keep it as a trading stock to protect profits.
Interest will return to it as the range opens up. The stock is now stabilizing above 50, in the 54-55 range. Hold, without any doubt.

recommendations.note: Buy only on dips below 300 / in 260-280; now a dividend play
recommendations.detail: Recently demerged and now trading standalone. Treat it largely as a dividend play, since all the important units have been demerged. If at all you want to buy, buy below 300, or in the 260-280 band closer to it.

recommendations.note: Hold; reduce on a technical rally near 800
recommendations.detail: Realty stocks are weak now, but Brigade has the advantage of regular lease income apart from construction income. The stock is at low levels, so no need to sell here. On any technical rally closer to 800, reduce the position. Hold as of now.

recommendations.note: Exit on any rally to 1,000-plus; continuous weakness
recommendations.detail: The stock has continuously fallen and displayed weakness even after results. It failed to cross the previous high of 1,125 (and the ~1,300 high), and fizzled out near 1,100. It is already at 925 with 1,000 breaking; on any rally to 1,000-plus, definitely exit. It could stay flat for a few days.

recommendations.note: Hold; good fundamentals but won't outperform now
recommendations.detail: A good stock with good fundamentals, but not one that can outperform the market at this time. It has the financial strength to perform over a period. Hold, but do not panic-sell in weakness.

recommendations.note: Hold; good fundamentals but won't outperform now
recommendations.detail: A good stock with good fundamentals, but not one that can outperform the market at this time. It has the financial strength to perform over a period. Hold, but do not panic-sell in weakness.

recommendations.note: Wait for results (~29th this month) before buying
recommendations.detail: One of the good stocks, trading near a 52-week high, though expensive and not a high-volume name; it continues with stable results. Results are nearby (date ~29th this month), so look after results before buying.
